locations.name: 彼得·博达尔特
locations.summary: 彼得·博达尔特（荷蘭語：Pieter Boddaert，發音：[ˈpitər ˈbɔdaːrt]；1733年5月26日—1795年5月6日）是一名荷蘭的醫生及博物學家。 博塔埃特的父親是米德爾堡的法學家及詩人(1694–1760)。與其父…

locations.name: 圭亚那 (地区)
locations.summary: 圭亚那（西班牙語：Las Guayanas；英語：The Guianas；法語：Guyanes；荷蘭語：Guyana's；葡萄牙語：Guianas）是南美洲北部、西北部的一个地区，并被划分为了数个主权国家和区域。前哥伦布时期，圭亚那地区的…

relations.subject: Pied water tyrant
relations.evidence: The pied water tyrant (Fluvicola pica) is a small passerine bird in the tyrant flycatcher family. It is found in Brazil, Colombia, French Guiana, Guyana, Panama, Peru, Suriname, Trinidad, and Venezuela, as a vagrant to Ecuador and possibly other areas as well.{{cite book | last = | first = | title =Check-list of North American Birds | publisher =American Ornithologists' Union |edition =7th | date =1998 | location =Washington, D.C

relations.subject: Pied water tyrant
relations.evidence: Sources agree that it is found in eastern Panama, from northern and central Colombia into northwestern Venezuela, on Trinidad, and from eastern Colombia across northern Venezuela, the Guianas, and to the mouth of the Amazon in extreme northern Brazil.Clements, J

relations.subject: Pied water tyrant
relations.evidence: Neither mention the other Caribbean islands. The pied water tyrant primarily inhabits freshwater marshes and the margins of lakes and ponds; it also occurs in nearby grasslands and gardens
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。
